introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.content: Aptea ("we", "our", or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our Resume Converter service.

dataCollection.title: Information We Collect
dataCollection.content: We collect information that you provide directly to us:

items.resume: Resume and CV data uploaded for analysis and improvement
items.usage: Usage data and interaction with our services
items.technical: Technical data (IP address, browser type, device information)

dataUse.title: How We Use Your Information
dataUse.content: We use the information we collect to:

items.service: Provide, maintain, and improve our services
items.improvement: Analyze and enhance resume content using AI
items.communication: Communicate with you about our services

dataProtection.title: Data Protection
dataProtection.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. All data is encrypted in transit and at rest.

gdpr.title: Your Rights (GDPR)
gdpr.content: Under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the following rights:

rights.access: Right to access your personal data
rights.rectification: Right to rectify inaccurate personal data
rights.erasure: Right to erasure ('right to be forgotten')

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.content: We use essential cookies to ensure the proper functioning of our service. These cookies are necessary for authentication and security purposes.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us:

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing or using the Resume Converter service provided by Aptea, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our service.

description.title: Service Description
description.content: Resume Converter is an AI-powered platform designed for IT services companies (ESN) and recruitment firms. It helps manage CV databases, analyze and improve resumes, adapt CVs to specific mission contexts, and export them using various templates.

account.title: User Accounts
account.content: To use our service, you must create an account. You are responsible for:

items.security: Maintaining the security of your account credentials
items.responsibility: All activities that occur under your account

usage.title: Acceptable Use
usage.content: You agree to use our service only for lawful purposes. You must not:

items.lawful: Use the service for any unlawful purpose
items.noHarm: Upload malicious content or attempt to harm the service
items.noAbuse: Abuse, harass, or discriminate against others
items.noUnauthorized: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems

intellectual.title: Intellectual Property
intellectual.content: The service, including its original content, features, and functionality, is owned by Aptea and is protected by international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.

userContent.title: User Content
userContent.content: You retain ownership of the resumes and content you upload. By using our service, you grant us a limited license to process your content solely for the purpose of providing the service.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer of Warranties
disclaimer.content: The service is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee that AI-generated suggestions will be accurate or suitable for your specific needs.

limitation.title: Limitation of Liability
limitation.content: Aptea shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages resulting from your use of the service.

termination.title: Termination
termination.content: We may terminate or suspend your account at any time for violations of these terms. Upon termination, your right to use the service will immediately cease.

governing.title: Governing Law
governing.content: These terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of France, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us:
